Headline: John M. Nickolaus Jr.
Description: John Mathew Nickolaus Jr. (May 18, 1913 – February 10, 1985) was an American cinematographer.

Headline: Roche Chevrière
Description: Roche Chevrière is a mountain of Savoie, France. It lies in the Massif de la Vanoise range. It has an elevation of 3,281 metres above sea level.

Headline: Judo at the 2004 Summer Olympics – Men's 73 kg
Description: Men's 73 kg competition in judo at the 2004 Summer Olympics was held on August 16 at the Ano Liossia Olympic Hall.[1][2]

Headline: Jai Prakash Aggarwal
Description: Jai Prakash Aggarwal (born 11 November 1944) is a politician from the Indian National Congress and a former member of the Parliament of India who has represented North East Delhi and Chandni Chowk in the Lok Sabha, the lower house of the Indian Parliament, and Delhi in the Rajya Sabha, the upper house of the Indian Parliament.

Headline: Anthony Midget
Description: Anthony Midget (born February 22, 1978)[3] is an American football coach.[4] He is the assistant secondary coach for the Pittsburgh Steelers of the National Football League (NFL). He played college football at Virginia Tech. After a short-lived career playing professionally in the National Football League (NFL), Midget began coaching beginning at the high school level and then progressing from college to the NFL.
